description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:latest Docker image. Define a global before_script that updates apt, sets the timezone to America/New_York, installs build-essential, python3, python3-numpy, python3-dev, gsl-bin, libgsl-dev, libgsl23, python3-scipy, python3-matplotlib, python3-mpi4py, python3-coverage, openmpi-bin, libopenmpi-dev, cython, python3-pkgconfig, libhdf5-openmpi-103, libhdf5-openmpi-dev, hdf5-tools, git, python3-astropy, python3-pip, python3-sphinx, then runs pip3 install Pillow, sphinxcontrib.programoutput, nbsphinx and sphinx_rtd_theme, clones https://github.com/h5py/h5py.git at tag 2.7.0, builds and installs it with CC=mpicc, clones and installs https://gitlab.com/revaz/pNbody.git and https://gitlab.com/revaz/Ptools.git via python3 setup.py install --user, runs a final python3 setup.py install --user, creates a matplotlib config with Agg backend. Add a build stage with a job named build that runs ./coverage.sh. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
